title: Equivalent expressions: negative numbers & distribution
description: Practice figuring out which expressions are equivalent by applying your knowledge of negative numbers and the distributive property.

hints: We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $3(-2a-4)+3a$.

Let's see if the first expression is equivalent to $3(-2a-4)+3a$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{-6a-12+3a}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 3(-2a-4)+3a  \\\\
\\\\
{-6a-12+3a}  &\stackrel{?}{=} (3)(-2a)-(3)4+3a   \\\\
\\\\
{-6a-12+3a}   &= -6a-12+3a \\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $3(-2a-4)+3a$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{3a+12}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 3(-2a-4)+3a  \\\\
\\\\
{3a+12}  &\stackrel{?}{=} (3)(-2a)-(3)4+3a   \\\\
\\\\
{3a+12}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -6a-12+3a \\\\
\\\\
{3a+12}   &\ne -3a-12\\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

The following expression is equivalent to $3(-2a-4)+3a$ :


-  ${-6a-12+3a} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $-6(b+2)+8$.

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $-6(b+2)+8$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{-6b-4}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -6(b+2)+8  \\\\
\\\\
{-6b-4}  &\stackrel{?}{=} (-6)b+(-6)2+8   \\\\
\\\\
{-6b-4}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -6b-12+8 \\\\
\\\\
{-6b-4}   &= -6b-4\\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

The following expression is equivalent to $-6(b+2)+8$ :


-  ${-6b-4} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $2(-6c+3)+4c$.

Let's see if the first expression is equivalent to $2(-6c+3)+4c$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{-8c+6}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 2(-6c+3)+4c  \\\\
\\\\
{-8c+6}  &\stackrel{?}{=} (2)(-6c)+(2)3+4c   \\\\
\\\\
{-8c+6}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -12c+6+4c   \\\\
\\\\
{-8c+6}   &= -8c+6 \\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

The following expressions are equivalent to $2(-6c+3)+4c$ :


-  ${-8c+6} $

-  ${3(-4c+2)+4c} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $-4(3d-2)-7$.

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $-4(3d-2)-7$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{12d-15}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -4(3d-2)-7  \\\\
\\\\
{12d-15}  &\stackrel{?}{=}  (-4)3d-(-4)2-7  \\\\
\\\\
{12d-15}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -12d-(-8)-7 \\\\
\\\\
{12d-15}   &\ne -12d+1\\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$
"None of the above" is the correct answer.
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $-7+3(-4e-3)$.

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $-7+3(-4e-3)$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{12e}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -7+3(-4e-3)  \\\\
\\\\
{12e}  &\stackrel{?}{=}  -7+(3)(-4e)-(3)3    \\\\
\\\\
{12e}  &\stackrel{?}{=}-7+(-12e)-9\\\\
\\\\
{12e}   &\ne -12e-16\\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

The following expression is equivalent to $-7+3(-4e-3)$ :


-  ${-4(3e+4)} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $-f-5(2f-3)$.

Let's see if the first expression is equivalent to $-f-5(2f-3)$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{-11f-3}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -f-5(2f-3)  \\\\
\\\\
{-11f-3}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -f-(5)2f+(5)3   \\\\
\\\\
{-11f-3}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -f-10f+15   \\\\
\\\\
{-11f-3}   &\ne -11f+15 \\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $-f-5(2f-3)$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{-11f+15}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -f-5(2f-3)  \\\\
\\\\
{-11f+15}  &\stackrel{?}{=}  -f-(5)2f+(5)3      \\\\
\\\\
{-11f+15}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -f-10f+15\\\\
\\\\
{-11f+15}   &= -11f+15 \\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

The following expression is equivalent to $-f-5(2f-3)$ :


-  ${-11f+15} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $3g+6(-g+(-5))$.

Let's see if the first expression is equivalent to $3g+6(-g+(-5))$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{9g+30}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 3g+6(-g+(-5))  \\\\
\\\\
{9g+30}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 3g+(6)(-g)+(6)(-5)   \\\\
\\\\
{9g+30}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 3g+(-6g)+(-30)   \\\\
\\\\
{9g+30}   &\ne -3g-30 \\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $3g+6(-g+(-5))$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{-3g-5}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 3g+6(-g+(-5))  \\\\
\\\\
{-3g-5}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 3g+(6)(-g)+(6)(-5) \\\\
\\\\
{-3g-5}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 3g+(-6g)+(-30)  \\\\
\\\\
{-3g-5}   &\ne -3g-30\\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$
"None of the above" is the correct answer.
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $-2(2h+10)+4h$.

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $-2(2h+10)+4h$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{-20}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -2(2h+10)+4h  \\\\
\\\\
{-20}  &\stackrel{?}{=} (-2)2h+(-2)10+4h   \\\\
\\\\
{-20}  &\stackrel{?}{=}  -4h+(-20)+4h\\\\
\\\\
{-20}   &= -20\\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

The following expressions are equivalent to $-2(2h+10)+4h$ :


-  ${-20-4h+4h} $

-  ${-20} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $4(3j+(-4))-9$.

The following expression is equivalent to $4(3j+(-4))-9$ :


-  ${-4(-3j+4)-9} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $5(-2k-3)+2k$.

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $5(-2k-3)+2k$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{-15}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 5(-2k-3)+2k \\\\
\\\\
{-15}  &\stackrel{?}{=}  (5)(-2k)-(5)3+2k   \\\\
\\\\
{-15}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -10k-15+2k   \\\\
\\\\
{-15}   &\ne  -8k-15\\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

The following expression is equivalent to $5(-2k-3)+2k$ :


-  ${(-5\cdot3)-8k} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $4m-2+(-8m)$.

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $4m-2+(-8m)$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{2(2m-1)-8m}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 4m-2+(-8m)  \\\\
\\\\
{2(2m-1)-8m}  &\stackrel{?}{=}  -4m-2    \\\\
\\\\
{(2)2m-(2)1-8m}  &\stackrel{?}{=}  -4m-2  \\\\
\\\\
{4m-2-8m}  &\stackrel{?}{=}  -4m-2  \\\\
\\\\
{-4m-2}   &= -4m-2  \\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

The following expressions are equivalent to $4m-2+(-8m)$ :


-  ${-2(4m+1) +4m} $

-  ${2(2m-1)-8m} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $-6n+(-12)+4n$.

The following expression is equivalent to $-6n+(-12)+4n$ :


-  ${4(n-3) -6n} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $5p+3p+(-9)$.

Let's see if the first expression is equivalent to $5p+3p+(-9)$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{8p+9}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 5p+3p+(-9)  \\\\
\\\\
{8p+9}  &\stackrel{?}{=} 8p+(-9)   \\\\
\\\\
{8p+9}   &\ne 8p-9 \\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

The following expression is equivalent to $5p+3p+(-9)$ :


-  ${3(p+(-3))+5p} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $-6+4q+(-6q)$.

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $-6+4q+(-6q)$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{2(q-3)}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -6+4q+(-6q)  \\\\
\\\\
{2(q-3)}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -2q-6  \\\\
\\\\
{(2)q-(2)3}  &\stackrel{?}{=}  -2q-6 \\\\
\\\\
{2q-6}   &\ne  -2q-6\\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$
"None of the above" is the correct answer.
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $12r-5$.

The following expressions are equivalent to $12r-5$ :


-  ${6(2r+(-1))+1} $

- ${-4(2+(-3r))+3}$
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $-3(2w+6)-4$.

The following expression is equivalent to $-3(2w+6)-4$ :


-  ${2(-3w+(-11))} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $-6+3(2+(-4t))$.

The following expression is equivalent to $-6+3(2+(-4t))$ :


-  ${-12t} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $5+(-3)(6x-5)$.
"None of the above" is the correct answer.
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $-2y-8+4y$.

Let's see if the first expression is equivalent to $-2y-8+4y$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{-2(y+4)+4y}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -2y-8+4y  \\\\
\\\\
{(-2)y+(-2)4+4y}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -2y-8+4y   \\\\
\\\\
{-2y+(-8)+4y}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -2y-8+4y   \\\\
\\\\
{-2y-8+4y  }   &=-2y-8+4y  \\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

Let's see if the second expression is equivalent to $-2y-8+4y$.

$\qquad
\begin{align}
\\\\
{4(-2+y)-2y}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -2y-8+4y  \\\\
\\\\
{(4)(-2)+(4)y-2y}  &\stackrel{?}{=} -2y-8+4y  \\\\
\\\\
{-8+4y-2y}  &\stackrel{?}{=}-2y-8+4y  \\\\
\\\\
{-2y-8+4y}   &=-2y-8+4y \\\\
\\\\
 \end{align}$

The following expressions are equivalent to $-2y-8+4y$ :

-  ${-2(y+4)+4y} $

-  ${4(-2+y)-2y} $
We can play around with the expressions in the answer choices to see if they are the same as $4(-5z+2)+(-6)$.

The following expression is equivalent to $4(-5z+2)+(-6)$ :


-  ${2(-10z+1)} $
